Hero.subheadline: Your trusted partner for specialized heavy transport, comprehensive customs clearance, and end-to-end supply chain solutions across Saudi Arabia.

Footer.tagline: Your Trusted Logistics Partner. Bold, industrial, professional transport services across Saudi Arabia.

About.heading: About FSAK Logistics
About.body: We are more than just a transport company. With over a decade of hands-on experience in the Saudi market, we deliver comprehensive logistics solutions designed to power your business. From heavy transport to seamless customs clearance, our dedicated fleet and expert team ensure your cargo arrives safely, on time, every time.

land_transport.title: Land Transport
land_transport.description: Reliable and efficient point-to-point land freight services tailored for domestic and GCC routes.

heavy_transport.title: Heavy Transport
heavy_transport.description: Specialized fleet dedicated to oversized, heavy, and abnormal cargo movements.

customs_clearance.title: Customs Clearance
customs_clearance.description: Expert handling of all documentation and procedures for smooth cross-border transportation.

freight_services.title: Freight Services
freight_services.description: Flexible freight forwarding solutions utilizing our extensive network to meet your deadlines.

warehousing.title: Warehousing
warehousing.description: Secure, scalable storage facilities equipped with modern inventory management systems.

supply_chain.title: Supply Chain
supply_chain.description: End-to-end supply chain optimization to streamline operations and reduce overhead costs.

project_1.title: Oversized Industrial Equipment Delivery
project_1.description: Successfully transported 200+ tons of industrial equipment across 1,200km in Saudi Arabia.

project_2.title: Express Port Clearance — Jeddah
project_2.description: Cleared 150 containers within 48 hours, saving the client significant demurrage costs.

project_3.title: Regional Distribution Center Setup
project_3.description: Established a 5,000 sqm distribution hub for a leading FMCG manufacturer in Riyadh.

project_4.title: Cross-Kingdom Freight Route
project_4.description: Operated a dedicated truck lane between Riyadh and Jeddah, achieving 98% on-time delivery.

project_5.title: Air-Freight Ground Handover — KAIA
project_5.description: Managed the ground logistics for 80 air-freight shipments at King Abdulaziz International Airport.

project_6.title: End-to-End Supply Chain for Petrochemical Firm
project_6.description: Designed and operated a full supply-chain solution from procurement through final-mile delivery.

Testimonials.quote: FSAK Logistics has been our go-to partner for all critical heavy transport needs. Their professionalism and reliability are unmatched in the region.
Testimonials.author: Ahmed Al-Rashid

Contact.heading: Request a Quote
Contact.body: Ready to optimize your supply chain? Fill in the form and one of our logistics experts will get back to you within 24 hours.
Contact.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.

AboutPage.title: About FSAK Logistics
AboutPage.who_body_1: FSAK Logistics was founded on one mission: to provide Saudi Arabia with a truly reliable, end-to-end logistics partner. From our first fleet of trucks to a fully integrated operation, we have grown in every direction — yet our commitment to on-time, damage-free delivery has never wavered.
AboutPage.who_body_2: Today we serve clients across the Kingdom and the GCC, offering land transport, heavy hauling, customs clearance, freight forwarding, warehousing, and full supply-chain management — all under one roof.
AboutPage.mission_body: To deliver reliable, technology-enabled logistics solutions that empower businesses across Saudi Arabia and the GCC, ensuring every shipment arrives safely and on time.
AboutPage.vision_body: To be the most trusted logistics brand in the Kingdom, recognised for innovation, integrity, and an unwavering commitment to our clients' success.
AboutPage.cta_body: Let's talk about how FSAK Logistics can power your next project.

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Six specialised service lines — one trusted partner.
ServicesPage.cta_body: Our experts are ready to design the perfect plan for your cargo.

ProjectsPage.title: Projects & Case Studies
ProjectsPage.subtitle: A look at the complex logistics challenges we have solved.
ProjectsPage.cta_body: We thrive on difficult projects. Let us show you what FSAK can do.
